user.title: New room
user.description: Create a room. Homex will create switch.room_lights_<id> to track whether the room is lit.

devices.title: Room devices
devices.description: Pick every lamp/switch in the room. Homex creates a light group plus two native scenes in scenes.yaml (room_lights_<id>_turn_on = all on, room_lights_<id>_turn_off = all off), editable in Settings -> Automations & scenes -> Scenes.

triggers.title: Triggers
triggers.description: Pick entities that should re-apply the room scene when they change. They feed the room_lights_switcher_<id> automation, which applies turn_on or turn_off depending on the room state.

error.invalid_id: The id must only contain lowercase letters, digits and underscores.

abort.already_configured: A room with this id already exists.

room.title: Room devices & triggers
room.description: Edit the room devices and the triggers. To edit the scenes, use Settings -> Automations & scenes -> Scenes.

add_group.title: Add a group
add_group.description: A group controls a subset of the room devices, with its own switch, light group, two scenes (room_lights_<id>_<groupId>_turn_on / _turn_off) and triggers.

edit_group.title: Edit group
edit_group.description: Change the group, or tick 'delete' to remove it.

error.invalid_id: The id must only contain lowercase letters, digits and underscores.
error.group_exists: A group with this id already exists in the room.
